creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=6b83e78072b6dbdc547f5764e7d343b688f1fd70

commit 6b83e78072b6dbdc547f5764e7d343b688f1fd70
Author:     Adam Weinberger <adamw@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2023-05-20 14:13:55 +0000
Commit:     Adam Weinberger <adamw@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-05-20 14:16:22 +0000

    sysutils/dust: Update to 0.8.6 and take maintainership

    Also: add manpage, completion files, and sample config. Rewrite
    pkg-descr to say what it actually does. And, take maintainership
    after multiple maintainer timeouts (the last we've heard from
    the outgoing maintainer was when they filed a PR to take
    maintainership).

    PR:             271268
    Approved by:    maintainer timeout

 sysutils/dust/Makefile        |  19 ++-
 sysutils/dust/Makefile.crates | 131 +++++++++++----------
 sysutils/dust/distinfo        | 268 +++++++++++++++++++++++-------------------
 sysutils/dust/pkg-descr       |   9 +-
 sysutils/dust/pkg-plist (new) |   6 +
 5 files changed, 244 insertions(+), 189 deletions(-)
